creator: bapt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Again this is not a bug.
FreeBSD 10.2 is not supported anymore and pkg is now built on 10.3 there is nothing I can do about it. There are some changes in the 10.3 libc which makes the binary incompatible with 10.2

the only thing I plan to do is to prevent pkg from upgrading itself if on an EOLed freebsd
